## What this changes

Brief description.

## Type

- [ ] Course content (module/lab)
- [ ] Scorecard (rubric / CLI / web)
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Site / visual
- [ ] Docs / housekeeping

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run docs:build` passes (it fails on dead links)
- [ ] `npm test` passes (if you touched the scorecard)
- [ ] New content is original prose, beginner-friendly, and Copilot-first
- [ ] Internal links resolve and any new pillar content links to `/diagnose`
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
